title: tetradymia multicaulis
intro: Tetradymia multicaulis, also known as a tickseed top, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the aster family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Tetradymia multicaulis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Tetradymia multicaulis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
